notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
The first generated version was retained as history because the robe damage read too close to ragged fugitive costuming and the half-burned eyebrow was less explicit.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three full-body states plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity preserves Meng Guizang as a 35 to 45 year old Old Book Society dead-book archivist with a deep grey scholar travel robe, half-burned eyebrow, smoke-black book-box harness, blackened book box, bone page clips, paper packets, wax pouches, and old book cords.
Faction symbol language remains fragmentary archive evidence rather than a clean wearable badge or newly invented Old Book Society crest.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
